creator: admin@support.od.ua
text:
(In reply to Vladyslav V. Prodan from comment #5)

I confirm the problem:

[10:39]ansible2:root-> /root# ansible-galaxy collection list
ERROR! importlib_resources is not installed and is required

# pkg install sysutils/ansible sysutils/py-ansible-core
